---
title: "Process BTC RSEM matrix"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-16"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load libraries and data
Libraries
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
```
Data
```{r}
dat <- read_delim("rsem.merged.gene_tpm.tsv", 
     delim = "\t", escape_double = FALSE, 
     trim_ws = TRUE)
head(dat)
```
Processing
```{r}
dat <- as.data.frame(dat)

row.names(dat) <- dat$gene_id
dat <- dat[,-c(1:2)]

head(dat)
```
Remove genes with all zeros across samples
```{r}
dat2 <- dat[apply(dat, 1, function(x) !all(x==0)),]
head(dat2)
```
Keep only samples that express at least one gene
```{r}
# Identify columns where all values are zero
cols_to_remove <- apply(dat2 == 0, 2, all)

# Subset the data frame to keep only columns that are NOT all zeros
dat3 <- dat2[, !cols_to_remove]
dim(dat3)
```
Print first rows of file
```{r}
head(dat3)
```
Save data
```{r}
write.csv(dat3,"processed_btc_tpm.csv", row.names = T)
```
